title: astragalus turbinatus
intro: Astragalus turbinatus, also known as Turbinatous Milk Vetch, is a type of flowering plant in the legume family. This perennial plant is native to China and has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for centuries. Astragalus turbinatus is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, due to its high content of flavonoids, saponins, and other bioactive compounds. The plant is commonly used in herbal preparations, such as teas, capsules, and tinctures, to promote immune function, reduce fatigue, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory and cardiovascular diseases.
